schema.name: rapid7_insightvm_sql_export
schema.description: Rapid7 InsightVM SQL Query Export Schema - Machine-readable reference for automation
schema.disclaimer: This schema represents the most complete reference available but is not officially verified by Rapid7

table_types.dimension: Master data, lookups, and reference tables

foreign_key_patterns.asset_tables: Most tables reference dim_asset via asset_id

dim_asset.description: Asset master data - core asset information
sample_queries: SELECT * FROM dim_asset WHERE ip_address IS NOT NULL
SELECT da.*, fa.vulnerabilities FROM dim_asset da JOIN fact_asset fa ON da.asset_id = fa.asset_id
SELECT dv.*, ds.summary FROM dim_vulnerability dv JOIN dim_vulnerability_solution dvs ON dv.vulnerability_id = dvs.vulnerability_id JOIN dim_solution ds ON dvs.solution_id = ds.solution_id
SELECT * FROM fact_asset WHERE vulnerabilities > 0 ORDER BY riskscore DESC
SELECT da.ip_address, fa.vulnerabilities, fa.riskscore FROM fact_asset fa JOIN dim_asset da ON fa.asset_id = da.asset_id

SELECT favi.*, da.ip_address, dv.title FROM fact_asset_vulnerability_instance favi JOIN dim_asset da ON favi.asset_id = da.asset_id JOIN dim_vulnerability dv ON favi.vulnerability_id = dv.vulnerability_id

common_joins.asset_vulnerability: dim_asset da JOIN fact_asset_vulnerability_instance favi ON da.asset_id = favi.asset_id JOIN dim_vulnerability dv ON favi.vulnerability_id = dv.vulnerability_id
common_joins.asset_scan: dim_asset da JOIN fact_asset_scan fas ON da.asset_id = fas.asset_id JOIN dim_scan ds ON fas.scan_id = ds.scan_id
common_joins.asset_site: dim_asset da JOIN dim_site_asset dsa ON da.asset_id = dsa.asset_id JOIN dim_site ds ON dsa.site_id = ds.site_id

get_asset_vulnerabilities.description: Get vulnerabilities for a specific asset
get_asset_vulnerabilities.query_template: SELECT dv.*, favi.* FROM dim_vulnerability dv JOIN fact_asset_vulnerability_instance favi ON dv.vulnerability_id = favi.vulnerability_id WHERE favi.asset_id = {asset_id}

get_critical_vulnerabilities.query_template: SELECT dv.*, da.ip_address FROM dim_vulnerability dv JOIN fact_asset_vulnerability_instance favi ON dv.vulnerability_id = favi.vulnerability_id JOIN dim_asset da ON favi.asset_id = da.asset_id WHERE dv.severity = 'Critical'
